title: ovieda anafensis
side_effects: Ovieda anafensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions in some individuals. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant can lead to gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, vomiting, and stomach pain. Additionally, improper use of Ovieda anafensis may cause interactions with medications, reducing their effectiveness or increasing the risk of adverse reactions. In severe cases, the plant's toxicity can result in respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma, emphasizing the importance of proper use and dosing.
